metadata.name: New Bouncing Balls - [CHRISTMAS TREE 2024 EDITED]
metadata.author: Jian Simanjuntak + Anandamide + Flexi + Amandio C
metadata.source: Jian Simanjuntak + Anandamide + Flexi + Amandio C - New Bouncing Balls - [CHRISTMAS TREE 2024 EDITED].milk

perFrameCode: x1  = x1 +  sx1;                         y1  = y1 + sy1;
sx1 = if(below(x1-rad1,0), abs(sx1)*d,sx1);   sy1 = sy1 - g;
sx1 = if(above(x1+rad1,1),-abs(sx1)*d,sx1);   sy1 = if(below(y1-rad1,0), abs(sy1)*d, sy1);
sx1= if( hit, sin(ang)*s1*cos(w1-ang) + cos(ang)*s2*sin(w2-ang), sx1);
sy1= if( hit, cos(ang)*s1*cos(w1-ang) - sin(ang)*s2*sin(w2-ang), sy1);
sx2= if( hit, sin(ang)*s2*cos(w2-ang) + cos(ang)*s1*sin(w1-ang), sx2);
sy2= if( hit, cos(ang)*s2*cos(w2-ang) - sin(ang)*s1*sin(w1-ang), sy2);
